summary: Single-line documentation fix in docs/quick-start.md:131 addressing external reviewer berendt's INFO-level feedback on inconsistent name-column format in the 'Architecture snapshot' block. The row entry for the OpenBao UI was changed from `svc/openbao :8200` to `openbao` in the name column, with the port relocated into the status column as `UI on :8200`. This aligns with the workload-prefix convention used by sibling rows (e.g. `openbao-0`, `headlamp-*`, `cert-manager-*`) that do not carry `svc/` prefixes or embedded ports in the name column. Remaining changes are bookkeeping: `.planwerk/progress/CC-0082-enable-openbao-ui-in-kind-overlay-and-document.json` phase transitioned from `awaiting_external_review` to `improving`, and a new `.planwerk/reviews/CC-0082-github-review-by-berendt-external-1.json` captures the external review record. Feature ID CC-0082 is preserved in the updated row. No changes to kustomization overlays, production HelmRelease, chart version pin, or test fixtures.
